title: Agent OS Grant (signed authority capability)
description: A capability scoped by (effectKinds x surface prefix). Authority only when delivered as a signature-verified artifact from the authority repo. Granularity = (domain x effectKind), surface-prefix scoped.

effectKinds.description: Use the sentinel 'lane-bootstrap' for the standing grant that authorizes bootstrapping autonomous-eligible lanes.

scopePrefix.description: Surface prefix the grant covers. Empty string or '*' = all surfaces (use only for lane-bootstrap).

approval.description: audit-logged approval reference (e.g. environment deployment id)
